theme: Section 2 — 'The living registry': curated real-vault cards (registry-as-proof) + see-all/graph affordances
change_summary: Added homepage Section 2 between sec.1 and How-it-Works: a curated grid of 8 REAL vaults from data/vaults.json (aDNA/standard, III/framework, CanvasForge/forge, TaskForge/coordination, LA Venture Graph/knowledge-graph, Home/node, WGA + Rare Archive/public-good org vaults) via a new token-driven RegistryCard.astro. Each card shows only honest fields — class label, status chip, display_name, 'tended by {persona}' attribution, one-line note (first sentence, capped) — and links to the vault's /vaults/{slug}/ detail page. Section footer: 'See all 40 vaults ->' (/vaults) + 'View the relationship graph ->' (/vaults/graph). Vault count pulled live from vaults.json.

doctrine_compliance.density_band: Dense — one organizing principle: a slice ACROSS the network's classes (subtitle states it); scannable card grid
doctrine_compliance.registry_as_proof: real governed vaults with personas/status are the content (HF/Replicate/Val Town curate-don't-dump — 8 curated, not a 40-dump; 'see all' routes to the full registry)
doctrine_compliance.honest_affordances: live affordance = navigation into the registry (card -> detail page; footer -> graph + full list). pull/compose/github/docs NOT fabricated — github_url/docs_site_url/federation_refs are empty in vaults.json and the marketplace data-shape is a pending Berthier/Operation-Homecoming dependency (coord 2026-06-03 Q1)
doctrine_compliance.two_colors: teal (brand) dominant; amber (brand accent) on pending chips; green (success token) on active chips is semantic status, used minimally — dominant accent pair unchanged
doctrine_compliance.ethos_subtle: WGA + Rare Archive (public-good org vaults) included by curation; shown not preached
doctrine_compliance.reuse: token-driven RegistryCard authored rather than reusing /vaults' VaultCard (whose hard-coded #4a86e8 blue hover would fight the teal palette) — VaultCard left untouched for /vaults

validation.visual_desktop: 4-up grid at 1280px; class/status/persona/note/open-vault render; WGA persona-line correctly omitted (null); footer affordances present
validation.visual_mobile: 390px — single column, no horizontal scroll (scrollW==clientW); cards legible
validation.persona_qa: deferred to E1 decadal Reviewer Lens Pass (Marketplace Consumer + Community Lead + Design Critic)

deploy: this cycle triggers the session's combined deploy (dark hero + sec.1 + sec.2) to adna.network
notes: Cycle 5 of E1. Upstream/polish backlog: (1) VaultCard.astro is off-token (hard-coded hex incl. blue hover) — candidate token refactor; (2) the registry generator should populate github_url/docs_site_url/federation_refs/tagline so richer affordances + federation proof signals can light up without fabrication; (3) status colors flagged for the cycle-10 Brand Strategist (green chip vs 2-color dial).
